name: server_admin
description: Execute server management commands on the GTA-Claw host. Supports: uptime, disk usage, memory, process list, Docker container status/stats/images/logs, network ports, hostname, and system date. Use when the user asks to check server status, monitor resources, view Docker containers, or diagnose infrastructure issues.

action.description: The server command to execute. 'system_info' returns Node.js/OS details via API; others run actual shell commands.

target.description: For docker_logs: the container name to fetch logs from (optional)
